text: In the first space, I feel a sense of calm and anticipation; the vast openness and neat, minimal design invite quiet reflection but also make me wonder what purpose this emptiness serves. In the second space, full of vivid colors and the energetic promise of research and development, I feel a spark of curiosity swell within me—I'm surrounded by evidence of human ingenuity, and my mind dances between admiration and inquiry. Together, these contrasting environments provoke a contemplative mood, urging me to consider the relationship between emptiness and inspiration, silence and discovery.
